patch.value: Cover MCP tool contract required fallback

value.author: lane-a-subagent-20260614
value.text:
Lane A src-coverage evidence update.

What changed:
- Extended `tests/unit/commands/register-commands.spec.ts` to cover additional register-operation and register-setup edge paths without adding new spec files:
  - dependency-failed exit behavior when linked-test runs set `fail_on_skipped_triggered`
  - extension/package lifecycle routing for adopt/adopt-all/activate/deactivate
  - package install path normalization when no explicit target is provided
  - doctor strict-exit behavior when summary status is `ok`
- Extended `tests/integration/mcp-handshake.spec.ts` to cover malformed `inputSchema.required` fallback handling in `buildMcpToolContracts`.

Verification run:
1) `node scripts/run-tests.mjs test -- tests/unit/commands/register-commands.spec.ts tests/integration/mcp-handshake.spec.ts`
   - PASS: 2 files, 69 tests.
2) `CI=1 node scripts/run-tests.mjs coverage -- --coverage.thresholds.lines=0 --coverage.thresholds.branches=0 --coverage.thresholds.functions=0 --coverage.thresholds.statements=0`
   - PASS: 158 files, 3388 tests.

Measured `src/**/*.ts` coverage delta (full-suite probe, thresholds disabled):
- lines: 97.99% -> 98.00% (covered +4)
- branches: 91.63% -> 91.64% (covered +1)
- functions: 97.69% -> 97.78% (covered +4)
- statements: 97.72% -> 97.74% (covered +4)

Targeted file deltas:
- `src/cli/register-setup.ts`: lines 92.17% -> 95.65%, functions 77.77% -> 88.88%
- `src/mcp/tool-definitions.ts`: branches 66.66% -> 100%

value.author: lane-a-wave2-subagent-20260614
value.text:
Lane A wave2 strict all-source push (targeted hotspot branch lift).

What changed:
- Extended tests/unit/commands/register-commands.spec.ts with expanded option-path coverage for test/test-all/stats/health/validate/contracts, plus docs mutation and close fallback branches.
- Extended tests/unit/schema-command.spec.ts with add-type/add-status human-format branch tests, case-insensitive alias show coverage, and wrapped non-Error parser/remover failure coverage.
- Extended tests/unit/history-activity-command.spec.ts with history-redact type-path migration coverage (task -> custom type folder move).
- Extended tests/unit/history-repair-command.spec.ts with unknown-author fallback/default-message coverage and rollback branch when history snapshot is unavailable.

Verification:
1) PM_RUN_TESTS_SKIP_BUILD=1 node scripts/run-tests.mjs test -- tests/unit/commands/register-commands.spec.ts tests/unit/schema-command.spec.ts tests/unit/history-activity-command.spec.ts tests/unit/history-repair-command.spec.ts
   - PASS: 4 files, 146 tests.
2) PM_RUN_TESTS_SKIP_BUILD=1 pnpm exec vitest run tests/unit/commands/register-commands.spec.ts tests/unit/schema-command.spec.ts tests/unit/runtime-schema-command-flags.spec.ts tests/unit/history-activity-command.spec.ts tests/unit/history-repair-command.spec.ts tests/unit/history-rewrite.spec.ts --coverage.enabled true --coverage.include='src/cli/register-mutation.ts' --coverage.include='src/cli/register-operations.ts' --coverage.include='src/cli/commands/schema.ts' --coverage.include='src/cli/commands/history-redact.ts' --coverage.include='src/cli/commands/history-repair.ts' --coverage.reporter=text --coverage.reporter=json-summary --coverage.reportsDirectory=coverage/lane-a-wave2-after --coverage.thresholds.lines 0 --coverage.thresholds.branches 0 --coverage.thresholds.functions 0 --coverage.thresholds.statements 0
   - PASS: 6 files, 172 tests.

Targeted branch coverage deltas (before -> after):
- src/cli/register-mutation.ts: 68.26% -> 70.98% (+2.72)
- src/cli/register-operations.ts: 68.00% -> 80.00% (+12.00)
- src/cli/commands/schema.ts: 71.50% -> 73.57% (+2.07)
- src/cli/commands/history-redact.ts: 76.42% -> 77.14% (+0.72)
- src/cli/commands/history-repair.ts: 79.41% -> 83.82% (+4.41)

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Lane A wave3 (opus orchestration, 2026-06-15): sub-agent lane-a-agent-20260614-opus ran ~40min (188 tool calls) before the account session-limit reset cut it off pre-documentation. Landed: new tests/unit/lane-a/pure-helpers-wave1.spec.ts + extended existing src specs (cli-main-errors, determinism, get-append-command, linked-test-parsers, migration-gates, mutation-projection, runtime-registrations, search-corpus, sentry-helpers, structure-exports, test-command). Behavior-preserving dead-branch eliminations (prove-dead over ignore, per ADR): append.ts/learnings.ts/notes.ts (resolveValue defined-when-flag-set casts), text-normalization.ts (jaccard union>=1 guaranteed), run-selectors.ts (match selector defined). Orchestrator verified the suite is green after fixing 2 cut-off-left broken specs.
